title: alyssum minus
intro: Alyssum minus, also known as groundsel, is a low-growing annual herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Alyssum minus has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Alyssum minus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual tolerance and the quality of the preparation.
